sections.paragraph:
verb חויב

be debited (finance) ; found guilty; obliged

verb לחיב (>>לחייב)

to commit, bind; find guilty; debit (finance)

verb להתחיב (>>להתחייב)

to commit oneself, undertake; be condemned

masculine noun and adjective חיב (>>חייב)

must, fain; obliged, beholden, obligant; owing, indebted; debtor; guilty, liable
